disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Penetrating injury to the sole of the foot from a piece of rusty fencing wire in the backyard about 6 hours ago
trigger_question_examples: What happened, and how did it happen?
What was the object made of and where did it come from?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He stepped on a rusty piece of fencing wire in the backyard about six hours ago and a bit of it is stuck in the bottom of his foot.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A metal fragment is still lodged in the wound; the parent could not remove it by hand
trigger_question_examples: Is anything still stuck in the foot?
Were you able to get it out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's still a sharp bit of metal poking out of the hole — I tried but I couldn't pull it out and he screams if I touch it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Redness, swelling and tenderness developing in the skin around the puncture over the hours since the injury
trigger_question_examples: What does the skin around the wound look like now?
Is the redness spreading or staying the same?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The skin around the hole has gone red and puffy and sore over the last few hours — it looks worse than when it first happened.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe localised pain with complete inability to bear weight on the affected foot
trigger_question_examples: Can he put any weight on it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The pain is really bad — he won't stand on it at all and cries if it's touched.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Tetanus immunisation status is uncertain — parent unsure whether boosters are up to date
trigger_question_examples: Are his vaccinations up to date, including tetanus?
Do you know when he last had a tetanus shot?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm honestly not sure if his tetanus shots are up to date — I'd have to check the records.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no shaking chills, and no red streaks tracking up the foot or leg at present
trigger_question_examples: Does he have a fever or shivering?
Are there any red streaks spreading up his foot or ankle?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever or shivering that I've seen, and I can't see any red lines running up his foot or leg — it's just red around the spot itself.
